name: The Real World Ends Here
description:
This is the point where the real world ends...
 
                        PROCEED AT YOUR OWN RISK!
 
The entrance to the Lizard Lair Safari is to the west.
There is a huge metal door to the south.

exits.description: This is the entrance way to the Safari.

extra_descriptions.description: It's one of those huge studio-like doors.  It seems pretty strong.
